emails.subject: Changed Deals - 460785, 460858, 460862
emails.body: Changed Deals 460785, 460858, 460862 These deals were entered as flowing all days, and should have just been Mon Sat. This was my fault, as I didn't know my computer defaulted to all days. (This has since been fixed!) I've changed them in the system and was told to let you know so you can re-confirm the deals with just on-peak days. Sorry about the hassle. I promise I'll get the hang of this soon! Thanks, Kate
